iteration_0.notes: Baseline with verbose original skill. Model edited buggy file instead of creating output file, generated incomplete code (missing closing braces).

iteration_1.notes: Concise skill with common patterns. Model called 'question' tool repeatedly instead of writing code. Wrong test filename search (test-race.ts vs race.test.ts).

iteration_2.notes: Added 'DO NOT ask questions' and glob for test files. Model now writes files but consistently drops final closing brace, causing syntax errors. Loops writing same broken content.

iteration_3.notes: Added read-back verification for closing braces. bsearch fixed but race-fixed.ts got EXTRA closing brace due to overzealous verification instruction.

iteration_4.notes: Removed brace-checking instructions. Added explicit brace count note to code example. Emphasized test-driven error fixing. Both tasks pass consistently.

changes: Replaced verbose 296-line process-heavy skill with concise 60-line action-oriented skill
Removed all auxiliary files (root-cause-tracing.md, defense-in-depth.md, condition-based-waiting.md, etc.)
Added explicit 'DO NOT ask questions' instruction to prevent question-tool loops
Added glob step to discover test files instead of guessing filenames
Included complete corrected code examples for common bug patterns
Added brace count note to prevent model from adding/omitting braces
